atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being in good health

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an ulcer on his right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has been present for approximately six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ulcer has appeared to worsen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no current pain in his foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his sugars have been running slightly higher than normal recently

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional numbness and tingling in his feet

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the numbness and tingling occur particularly in colder weather

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports frequent tension headaches

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the tension headaches are often in the front of his head

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies fever or chills

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he used to smoke

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he smoked for at least twenty years

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an average of two packs per day

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is 127/78

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate is 68 bpm

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Jugular venous distension is not present

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Carotid bruits are not present

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart sounds are normal

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A two out of six systolic ejection murmur is heard at the left base

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis and posterior tibial pulses are palpable

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A two by three centimeter ulcerated lesion is present on the right lateral foot near the fifth metatarsal-metatarsophalangeal joint

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is no associated cellulitis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Granulation tissue and slight purulent discharge are present at the base of the wound

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are within normal limits

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a non-healing ulcer on his right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The ulcer is likely related to his diabetes and vascular status

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an arterial ultrasound of the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1c test.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes aspirin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers to a vascular surgeon for consideration of potential interventions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wound care management.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment with the primary care physician.
